hero.title: An incredible experience awaits you at ASU
hero.subtitle: Design a personalized college experience

rankings.heading: #1 in the U.S. for innovation
rankings.description: ahead of MIT and Stanford – U.S. News & World Report, 2016-2026

rankings.heading: #1 in the U.S. for global impact
rankings.description: ahead of Michigan State, Penn State and MIT – Times Higher Education, 2020-2024

rankings.heading: #2 in the U.S. for employability
rankings.description: among public universities ahead of Michigan and Purdue – U.S. News & World Report, 2026

rankings.heading: #3 in the U.S. for first-year experiences
rankings.description: among public universities ahead of Stanford, Harvard and Yale – U.S. News & World Report, 2025

topoSection.highlightedText: Make your college experience what you want it to be
topoSection.remainingText: , and continue on the path to who you're becoming.
topoSection.subtext: Take the quizzes below and use the results to get an idea of what your college experience might be like.

studyHero.title: What do you want to study?

studyQuiz.highlightedText: Not sure what to major in? We’ve got you.
studyQuiz.bodyText: Pick the most appealing photos in this quiz and we’ll give you three majors and three career options you might like.

liveLearnHero.title: Where do you want to live and learn?

networkQuiz.bodyText: Knowing what kind of student you're likely to be can help you figure out what you should look for in a college. Are you a Trailblazer? A Deep Diver? Find out.

payingForCollege.heading: Paying for College
payingForCollege.description: Knock out each of the tasks below to get the most financial aid possible.

accolade.alt: ASU named a Best Value College - The Princeton Review, 2024

cards.title: Aim for a New American University Scholarship
cards.description: All admitted ASU students are considered for a scholarship of up to $86,000 over four years.

cards.title: Cruise ASU’s ScholarshipUniverse
cards.description: After you've applied, search and apply for thousands of scholarships all in one place.

cards.title: Send in your FAFSA
cards.description: Fill out the Free Application for Federal Student Aid and see how much you qualify for in federal dollars.

howWeHelp.heading: How can we help?
howWeHelp.description: ASU has representatives that can talk through any questions you have about what makes ASU different and help you find your fit.
